name: golang-github-pelletier-go-toml-dev
title: golang-github-pelletier-go-toml-dev
summary: Go library for the TOML format
description:
Go library for the TOML format
This library supports TOML (Tom's Obvious, Minimal Language)
version v1.0.0-rc.3
.
Go-toml provides the following features for using data parsed
from TOML documents:
.
* Load TOML documents from files and string data
* Easily navigate TOML structure using Tree
* Marshaling and unmarshaling to and from data structures
* Line & column position data for all parsed elements
* Query support similar to JSON-Path
* Syntax errors contain line and column numbers
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-pelletier-go-toml-dev because Go library for the TOML format.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-pelletier-go-toml-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-pelletier-go-toml-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-pelletier-go-toml-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
